ogTitle: Lake Argyle vs Lake Biddy: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lake Argyle and Lake Biddy.
heading: Lake Argyle vs Lake Biddy — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lake Argyle, Western Australia and Lake Biddy, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Argyle has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Lake Biddy (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lake Argyle or Lake Biddy safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lake Argyle has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Lake Biddy scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lake Argyle scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Biddy scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lake Argyle or Lake Biddy?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Argyle has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
